text: I feel a sense of curiosity and openness as I move from a quiet, reflective space filled with personal belongings and subdued light into a vibrant, thought-provoking exhibit bursting with color and information. The first scene feels transitional, perhaps a place for contemplation before engagement. The second scene excites me intellectually, inviting me to ponder the intersection of research and human experience. I am both observer and participant, aware of my own perceptions and the infinite possibilities these spaces represent.
